attacks.name: Trample
attacks.text: For each Benched Pokémon in play (yours and your opponent's), flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Headpress
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, this attack does nothing (not even damage).

attacks.name: Double Lariat
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Counter
attacks.text: If an attack damages Wobbuffet during your opponent's next turn (even if Wobbuffet is Knocked Out), flip a coin. If heads, Wobbuffet attacks the Defending Pokémon for an equal amount of damage.

attacks.name: Flame Burst
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 damage plus 20 more damage and does 20 damage to Typhlosion. If tails, this attack does 60 damage.

attacks.name: Attract Current
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, you may search your deck for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Lightning Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Gigavolt
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, this attack does 40 damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Doubleslap
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Searing Flames
attacks.text: Discard 2 Fire Energy cards attached to Entei or this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Psychic Damage
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put 1 damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.text: You may search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to Ho-Oh. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sacred Fire
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Dive Bomb
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Evolutionary Spore
attacks.text: Choose any number of your Hoppips and Skiplooms. Then, for each Pokémon you chose in this way, you may search your deck for a card that evolves from that Pokémon and attach it to that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving those Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dark Flame
attacks.text: Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Houndoom or this attack does nothing. If there are any Darkness Energy cards in your discard pile, attach 1 of them to Houndoom.

attacks.name: Black Fang
attacks.text: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Darkness Energy attached to Houndoom. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Shockwave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance. Then, if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Pokémon Powers, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Night Eyes
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Perish Song
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Asleep and was attacked with Night Eyes during your last turn, it is Knocked Out.

attacks.name: Lightning Tackle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Raikou does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Aurora Wave
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If only 1 is heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Shock Bolt
attacks.text: Discard all Lightning Energy cards attached to Dark Ampharos or this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Dark Drain
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each of your opponent's Pokémon. For each heads, this attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance. Remove a number of damage counters from Dark Crobat equal to the damage dealt. If Dark Crobat has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Present
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. If exactly 1 is heads, this attack does 40 damage. If exactly 2 are heads, remove 3 damage counters from the Defending Pokémon. If the Defending Pokémon has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them. If all 3 are heads, this attack does 60 damage. If all 3 are tails, remove all damage counters from the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Submission
attacks.text: Poliwrath does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Steel Wing
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, all damage done by attacks to Skarmory during your opponent's next turn is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Delta Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose whether the Defending Pokémon becomes Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Eerie Howl
attacks.text: If your opponent's Bench isn't full, look at his or her hand. If your opponent has any Baby Pokémon or Basic Pokémon there, choose 1 of them and put it on his or her Bench. Then, switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Fire
attacks.text: If there are any Darkness Energy cards attached to Dark Houndoom, discard 1 of them and this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage (plus 10 more damage for the Darkness Energy you discarded). If there aren't any, this attack does 30 damage.

attacks.name: Rushing Flames
attacks.text: You may discard any number of Fire Energy cards attached to your Pokémon. Flip a coin for each Fire Energy card discarded in this way. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Mountain Smasher

attacks.name: Fling Away

attacks.name: Gentle Flames
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Baby Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage instead of 50. If the Defending Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 30 damage instead of 50.

attacks.name: Gouge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

attacks.name: Psysplash
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon for each Energy card attached to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Light Wave
attacks.text: Prevent all effects of attacks, other than damage, done to Light Dragonite during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam-GX
attacks.text: (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Flare Blitz-GX
attacks.text: (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Crushing Blow
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of those cards and discard it.

attacks.name: Pull In
attacks.text: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, you may choose 1 of them and switch it with the Defending Pokémon (before doing damage or other effects of this attack). Either way, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Max Surfer

attacks.name: Plasma

attacks.name: Grass Knot

attacks.name: Max Leaf

If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Fire, Water, and Lightning Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 110 damage to 3 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Storm Slash
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Max Thunder Rumble
attacks.text: This attack also does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Incinerate
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spark Ball-GX
attacks.text: (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

attacks.name: Revenge Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Incinerate
attacks.text: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Explosive Fire
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Star Blaze

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Aqua Typhoon

attacks.name: Explosive Fire
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Star Blaze
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

attacks.name: Trick Wind

attacks.name: Fluffball Star
attacks.text: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game.)

attacks.name: Max Detonate
attacks.text: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. This attack does 100 damage for each Energy card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Psypump
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Psychic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Limit Break

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Mix

attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: G-Max Wildfire
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: G-Max Volt Tackle

attacks.name: Cross Fusion Strike

attacks.name: Max Miracle
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Healing Water

If heads, prevent all damage done to Shining Mewtwo from that attack (any other effects of attacks still happen) and do 20 damage to the attacking Pokémon.

attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

(Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Then, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Energy card attached to each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Energy cards attached to it and discard those Energy cards.
